task: Advanced high-value task: Ready-Valid Handshake Trace Release Blocker Table. Scenario: a specialist reviewer found conflicting signals and needs an auditable explanation of which values matter for ready-valid handshake trace. Embedded packet: Records: R1 stall_cycles=19 fifo_full=41 max_stall=6; R2 stall_cycles=28 fifo_full=37 max_stall=9; R3 stall_cycles=14 fifo_full=52 max_stall=5. Remediation options: O1 changes stall_cycles by -12% cost=65000; O2 changes fifo_full by -18% cost=86200; O3 changes max_stall by -25% cost=47800; max_budget=110400. Rules and constraints: stall_cycles>max_stall while fifo_full=1 is a deadlock warning; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: design the output schema and acceptance checks an automated agent would need to reproduce the analysis. Deliver ready_valid_checker_4.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
